preToolUse.description: Warn when editing test files in a skip/only state
preToolUse.command: if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE '\.(spec|test)\.(ts|js|tsx|jsx|py)$'; then grep -nE '\.(only|skip)\(' $TOOL_FILE 2>/dev/null && echo WARNING: test has .only/.skip; fi; true

postToolUse.command: if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE '\.(ts|js|tsx|jsx)$'; then npx jest --findRelatedTests $TOOL_FILE --passWithNoTests 2>/dev/null || true; fi; true
if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE '\.(spec|test)\.'; then npx eslint $TOOL_FILE --quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi; true
